browser-use.usage_hint: Full browser automation for live sites, forms, screenshots, and JS-heavy pages—prefer over raw HTTP when the DOM or user interactions matter.

context7.usage_hint: Up-to-date library and framework docs (APIs, examples, version notes)—use when accuracy beats training-data recall.

shadcn.usage_hint: shadcn/ui React components: variants, props, CLI install, and registry lookups.

github.usage_hint: GitHub API for repos, issues, PRs, and metadata—requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in this server’s env.

fetch.usage_hint: Fetch a URL’s raw body (HTML/JSON/text) when you need content without driving a browser.

duckduckgo.usage_hint: Web search snippets and links for discovery before deeper fetch or browser work.

magic.usage_hint: Rapid UI/component scaffolding (21st.dev Magic)—use when the user wants quick generated UI.

rigour.usage_hint: Rigour Labs MCP—structured quality/rigor workflows; follow each exposed tool’s description.
